targets.description: Array of domains or keywords to track LLM mentions for

type.description: Whether this target is a domain or a keyword

value.description: Domain (e.g. example.com, max 63 chars) or keyword (max 250 chars)

searchFilter.description: Whether to include or exclude this target. Default: include

platform.description: AI platform to search mentions on. Default: google

languageCode.description: Language code. Default: en (ChatGPT only supports English)

limit.description: Maximum number of mention items to return. Default: 100
